Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2F26 "STRIKEFORCECOBRA-0A00-2F26" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0a00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Strike Force Cobra.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0A00 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. Also restored 32 bytes of data to the loading screen bitmap at $FD30 which were corrupted at the end of the original loading code by a call to the kernal RESTOR routine ($FD15).
